OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO STAY ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CATHERINE SCHMITZ'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 17, 2012 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 16, 2012 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHMITZ, CATHERINE A
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-16-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CATHERINE SCHMITZ'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION IS DENIED. MS. SCHMITZ'S CURRENT INABILITY TO PAY THE DEBT OWED IS NOT A BASIS TO STAY THIS ACTION. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WITH THE NAME AND ADDRESS OF THE PREVAILING PARTY'S COUNSEL OR THE PREVAILING PARTY IF PRO PER IN THE TOP LEFT OF THE FIRST PAGE OF PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Stay Action And Pos
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CATHERINE SCHMITZ'S Motion To Stay Action is denied. Ms. Schmitz's current inability to pay the debt owed is not a basis to stay this action. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order with the name and address of the prevailing party's counsel or the prevailing party if pro per in the top left of the first page of proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Stay Action And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Continued To Dec-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT CATHERINE SCHMITZ'S Motion To Stay Action is continued on the court's own motion to December 17, 2012 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than November 16, 2012 at 4 pm, or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the motion. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/EHG)
